acceptOwnership().details: The new owner accepts the ownership transfer.

params.allowedGames: Array of game contract addresses the delegate can use
params.delegate: The address that can act on behalf of the caller
params.maxBetAmount: Maximum bet amount per individual bet
params.spendingLimit: Total spending limit for the entire session

returns.sessionId: The ID of the created session

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

pendingOwner().details: Returns the address of the pending owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Starts the ownership transfer of the contract to a new account. Replaces the pending transfer if there is one. Can only be called by the current owner. Setting `newOwner` to the zero address is allowed; this can be used to cancel an initiated ownership transfer.

params.game: The game contract address (should be msg.sender in the game)

createSession(address,uint256,uint256,ui.notice: Create a session key for a delegate

getDelegateSessions(address).notice: Get all session IDs for a delegate

getSessionDelegate(uint256).notice: Get the delegate for a session

getSessionOwner(uint256).notice: Get the owner for a session

getUserSessions(address).notice: Get all session IDs for a user

isSessionValid(uint256).notice: Check if a session is currently valid

registerGame(address).notice: Register a game contract that can be used in sessions

registeredGames(address).notice: Registered game contracts (only registered games can be allowed)

remainingLimit(uint256).notice: Get the remaining spending limit for a session

revokeSession(uint256).notice: Revoke a session. Only the session owner can revoke.

sessionAllowedGames(uint256,address).notice: Allowed games per session: sessionId => gameAddress => allowed

useSession(uint256,address,uint256).notice: Validate and record a bet using a session key.         Called by game contracts.
